name: jurisearch-dashboard-workspace
//: Bun is pinned to 1.3.14 (packageManager below + bunfig.toml). The compile target's GNU triple x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu must equal dist.sh's $TARGET so the --version stamp passes the release audit.

scripts.typecheck: bun run stamp && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.compile: bun run stamp && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/jurisearch-dashboard
